text.title: Guardrails AI — Validator-Based Output Pipeline — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the output have a typed schema (Pydantic / RAIL)?

branch.question: What is the dominant validator class?

branch.conclusion: Use Hub:DetectPII / ToxicLanguage. on_fail='filter' or 'refrain'. Pin versions.
Use ValidJson / RegexMatch. on_fail='reask' default; cap max_reasks=3.
Use SimilarityToList / ContainsString. on_fail='fix' if deterministic, 'reask' otherwise.
Define a schema first. Without schema, Guardrails has no contract to enforce.

example.p: Support-reply pipeline with PII + tone validators → schema present → pii_or_safety class → r4 → filter + refrain.
